title: Best Ever
description: Personal Modpack available for the Public! (discontinued)
body:
**Features that the modpack offers:**

Completely Overhauled World Generation:
This modpack introduces changes to how the Minecraft world generates. With mods like Regions Unexplored and Geophilic, players will encounter diverse landscapes, unique biomes, and interesting terrain features.
User Experience Impact:
Players will explore fresh environments, discover new resources, and encounter unexpected challenges. The revamped world generation keeps exploration exciting.

Fully Optimized with Shader Support (add iris mod manually for A1.01_1.20.1) :
By optimizing your modpack, you ensure smoother performance and compatibility. Shader support enhances visual quality, adding realistic lighting, shadows, and water effects.
User Experience Impact:
Players can enjoy stunning visuals without sacrificing performance. The game becomes more immersive, especially when exploring beautiful landscapes or building intricate structures.

Overhauled Stronghold & Fortress:
This modpack reimagines the iconic strongholds and fortresses found in Minecraft. Expect new layouts, additional rooms, and perhaps hidden secrets.
User Experience Impact:
Players will have fresh challenges when raiding strongholds or battling mobs within revamped fortresses. The mystery and excitement of exploration are heightened.

Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures:
Mods like Dungeon Crawl and Repurposed Structures introduce a plethora of dungeons, ruins, and other structures across the world.
User Experience Impact:
Players will stumble upon unexpected adventures, uncover hidden treasures, and face unique enemies. The world feels richer and more dynamic.

Quality of Life (QoL) Features:
This modpack includes conveniences like Waystones (fast travel points)
User Experience Impact:
These QoL features streamline gameplay. Waystones allow quick travel, reducing tedious backtracking, while XP Tomes optimize skill progression.
